mano_cua.result_summary: Bug confirmed via source code diff. Two issues: 1) calcXY() in calculateUtils.js uses margin[0]/margin[1] for coordinate offset but should use containerPadding[0]/containerPadding[1]. 2) GridItem.jsx onDrag/onDragEnd redundantly subtracts containerPadding before calling calcXY. When margin != containerPadding, placeholder position diverges from dragged item. Fix: calcXY uses containerPadding from positionParams, GridItem removes redundant subtraction.
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Buggy calcXY: x = Math.round((left - margin[0]) / (colWidth + margin[0])). Fixed calcXY: x = Math.round((left - containerPadding[0]) / (colWidth + margin[0])). GridItem buggy: calcXY(params, top - containerPadding[1], left - containerPadding[0], w, h). Fixed: calcXY(params, top, left, w, h). Double subtraction of containerPadding + wrong offset base = placeholder misalignment when margin != containerPadding.
